title: RAPIDE Auto Extreme AX Alloy Wheel Spray Paint Black 300ML | Ideal for Refreshing & Customizing Alloy Wheels | Long-Lasting, Chip & Fade Resistant | Smooth Satin Finish
features: Perfect for Alloy Wheels: Specifically formulated to refresh and customize alloy wheels, enhancing their appearance with a professional finish.
Long-Lasting & Durable: Provides a chip and fade resistant coating that ensures your wheels stay looking great over time.
Smooth Satin Finish: Delivers a sleek, satin finish that adds a modern touch to your wheels, blending seamlessly with various styles.
Easy Application: Designed for straightforward application, making it ideal for both DIY enthusiasts and professionals.
High-Performance Formula: Ensures a high-quality finish that resists wear and tear, protecting your wheels from everyday damage.
description: Auto Extreme Alloy Wheel Spray Paint Black This Black Wheel Spray Paint from Rapide will renovate and transform your wheels. With a classic, smooth touch finish, it brings a new lease of life to tired alloys. Furthermore, this Matt spray paint has been specially designed to give a stunning finish to other parts of your vehicle. You can even use it on furniture in your home. Simply apply and leave for 16 hours to dry - a great way to revamp your vehicle, all the while keeping costs down. Covers 2msq per litre on average. In addition - Surface preparation: For best results, ensure surface is clean, dry & free from loose paint, mould & mildew, wax or oil. If wax has been used, clean the surface thoroughly with white spirit. We recommend that bare wood should be sanded before painting. Hard glossy surfaces should be abraded before painting. Cover surrounding areas to protect from spray mist. Also - You can apply this to a multitude of other surfaces such as Metal, Wood, Plastic and even Glass with the correct preparation. Finally, check out more points below for Auto Extreme Alloy Wheel Spray Paint Black Location of application - Interior & Exterior For use on - Vehicles, Furniture, Metal, Wood, Plastic, Glass and more Coverage - 2msq per litre Drying time - 16 hours Recoat time - 4 hours Touch dry time - 1 hour Paint/Stain/Varnish base - Solvent-based VOC description - Very high Highly concentrated
